MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER BADRUDIN KURWA, MD Petition For Writ Of Mandate:
APPEAR: Albert J. Garcia, Esq. 510/848-5190 for petitioner & moving party; Mia Perez-Argote, Deputy Atty General 213/897-7007 for respondent & opposing party.
